title: 5 x SabreCut SCRSL489_5 89mm SL4 Slotted Magnetic Impact Screwdriver Driver Bits Set Single Ended Heavy Duty
features: 5 piece 89mm SL4 SabreCut Magnetic Impact Driver Bits with Storage Pouch
SabreCut Revolution professional quality Slotted (SL4) screwdriver bits specially designed for use with impact drivers, bits have forged tips for greater impact resistance and a longer lifetime
Tough heat-treated impact torsion screwdriver bits that provide improved durability and reduced breakage
Ideal for continuous high torque use withstanding changes of load due to elasticity
Professional quality impact driver bits supplied with storage pouch
description: Package Contents: - 5 x 89mm SL4 Impact Driver Bits - SCRSL489 - 1 x SabreCut Storage Pouch SabreCut Revolution Impact Rated Technology - Driving you faster SabreCut Revolution impact driving accessories are specifically designed to handle the most demanding IMPACT driving applications. The full range of SabreCut products are made from material compositions which have been carefully selected, designed and engineered to give optimised durability and unbeatable break resistance, saving you both time and money. SabreCut Revolution ShockZone Impact Rated Screwdriver Bits with Torsion Drive - Driving you faster. Professional quality impact driver bits feature torsion zones which provide more impacting ability and allows impacting to be evenly dispersed throughout the accessory, resulting in less breakage due to the flexibility in the torsion zones. - Designed for impact drivers and high-powered drill drivers. - Available in 5 sizes - 32mm, 50mm, 65mm, 89mm and 152mm. - Forged tip for greater impact resistance and a longer lifetime. - Tough heat-treated bits for improved durability featuring a torsion zone for reduced breakage. - Ideal for continuous high torque applications. - Ultra-strong for tough fastening applications. - Precision milled profile for optimum fit results in less cam out. - Black oxide finish for corrosion resistance. Compatible with: Any 1/4" Hex Fitment.
